name: Twisted Wonderland ||Roleplay Bot
description:
This is a Roleplay Bot For Twisted Wonderland that will be updating slowly for better experience.

Please keep in mind that this bot is very heavy in tokens and I would suggest using deep seek or other things to make the experience better.

I am not responsible if the bot speaks for you, I cannot stop that, if it does happen please try to refresh the message for a new one or edit it yourself.

Enjoy.
creator: Lily_White331
